title: Embodied Capability Module (ECM) Manifest
description: Schema for an ECM manifest following the formal definition E_i = (C_i, S_i, M_i, P_i, D_i) from the AEROS paper.

version.description: Semantic version string. Part of D_i (metadata).

description.description: Human-readable summary of the ECM. Part of D_i.

capabilities.description: C_i: High-level capability definitions exposed to the agent.

skills.description: S_i: Skill identifiers with typed input-output interfaces.

models.description: M_i: Optional models and tool adapters for perception/reasoning.

resources.description: Part of D_i: Computational resource requirements.

dependencies.description: Part of D_i: Other ECM IDs this package depends on.

compatibility.description: Part of D_i: Platform and runtime compatibility info.
